title: Raccoon Removal in University Heights, Bronx | $900 – $4,000
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in University Heights, Bronx. Safe, humane wildlife control for homes and buildings. Licensed experts. Call Best Pest Control NYC today!
intro: University Heights residents face unique raccoon challenges due to the neighborhood's proximity to green spaces and historic architecture. Our professional raccoon removal services protect your University Heights property from these intelligent and persistent wildlife invaders. Best Pest Control NYC offers safe, humane, and effective raccoon extraction with prices ranging from $900 to $4,000 depending on infestation severity.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving University Heights and the greater Bronx area with specialized wildlife removal expertise. Our licensed technicians understand the unique architectural challenges of University Heights homes, from pre-war apartment buildings to single-family residences near Goulden Avenue and University Avenue.
localContext: University Heights' tree-lined streets and proximity to Bronx Community College campus create ideal conditions for raccoon activity, particularly in areas near the Harlem River waterfront. The neighborhood's mix of classic brick apartment buildings and older residential structures often provide raccoons with accessible entry points through deteriorating roof lines, chimneys, and foundation gaps.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in University Heights?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in University Heights typically costs between $900 and $4,000. The final price depends on factors including the number of raccoons, accessibility of nesting areas, necessary repairs, and whether babies are present. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in University Heights, Bronx?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are increasingly common in University Heights due to the area's mature trees, nearby parks, and accessible food sources. They frequently inhabit attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces in the neighborhood's older buildings, especially during spring birthing season and fall when they seek warm shelter.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my University Heights property?
faqs.answer: Most raccoon removal projects in University Heights are completed within 3-7 days, though complex infestations may take longer. We begin with an immediate inspection, followed by humane trapping and removal. If baby raccoons are present, we use specialized techniques to safely relocate the entire family while complying with New York wildlife regulations.

faqs.question: Do you repair damage caused by raccoons in University Heights homes?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide comprehensive raccoon damage repair and prevention services throughout University Heights. This includes sealing entry points, replacing damaged insulation, cleaning contaminated areas, repairing roof damage, and installing preventative barriers. All repairs come with a warranty to ensure raccoons don't return to your property.
